model_specification_line: model = smf.ols('outcome ~ treatment + C(STATEFIP) + C(YEAR) + C(YEAR)*treatment + UNEMP + LFPR + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + TASK287G + JAIL287G + SECURECOMMUNITIES', data=df).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['STATEFIP']})
